records.m_Talk_ENG: After much debate, you came to the conclusion
records.m_Talk_VTN:
Sau nhi87
9u cu87kc tranh lu86{n, ng95pi 96e95s 96ei 96e8691n k8691t lu86{n,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nach langen 95nberlegungen bist du zum Schluss gekommen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.
records.m_Talk_VTN: v87mi s87 suy x959t k8785 c95png, ng98~87oi nh95rn vi95xn n95py l95p ho95pn to95pn c86wn thi8691t cho t98~98qng lai ph95{a tr98~87mc c87wa ng95pi.
records.m_Talk_DEU: dass diese Mitarbeiterin, 9588ber die du so viel nachgedacht hast, absolut unverzichtbar f9588r die Zukunft des Unternehmens ist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: vous 95xtes arriv959 95p la conclusion que cette employ959e 959tait un 959l959ment vital pour votre entreprise et son futur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you've decided
records.m_Talk_DEU: Daher hast du beschlossen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vous avez donc d959cid959

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.
records.m_Talk_VTN: r86ng ng95pi s8689 ch87an c9580 86uy, b86ut ch86up h86{u qu86s ra sao.
records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: de rester 95p ses c9580t959s et la soutenir, peu importe les cons959quences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mmh, I'm not sure how to refer to you here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mmh, I'm not sure how to refer to you here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mmh, I'm not sure how to refer to you here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what Mother used to call you, but we all have different names for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what Mother used to call you, but we all have different names for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what Mother used to call you, but we all have different names for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you want to be called? Boss? Old Voice? Sage? Administrator...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you want to be called? Boss? Old Voice? Sage? Administrator...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you want to be called? Boss? Old Voice? Sage? Administrator...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! Then, Eve is going to call you Mister!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! Then, Eve is going to call you Mister!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! Then, Eve is going to call you Mister!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you should call Eve Eve!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you should call Eve Eve!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you should call Eve Eve!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I like humans like you, Mister. I smell something sweet from you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I like humans like you, Mister. I smell something sweet from you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I like humans like you, Mister. I smell something sweet from you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pain, suffering, sorrow, anger, love, joy...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pain, suffering, sorrow, anger, love, joy...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pain, suffering, sorrow, anger, love, joy...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have so much information right... here. Which an ordinary human even can't bear them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have so much information right... here. Which an ordinary human even can't bear them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have so much information right... here. Which an ordinary human even can't bear them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! Pan! You can't just come out like that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! Pan! You can't just come out like that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! Pan! You can't just come out like that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There, there. Mommy's having an important conversation, so be more patient.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There, there. Mommy's having an important conversation, so be more patient.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There, there. Mommy's having an important conversation, so be more patient.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew. It almost ate you, Mister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew. It almost ate you, Mister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew. It almost ate you, Mister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu fuu. Don't worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu fuu. Don't worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu fuu. Don't worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eve saves the best for last.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eve saves the best for last.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eve saves the best for last.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're really important to us, so we can be patient, even if we're super hungry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're really important to us, so we can be patient, even if we're super hungry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're really important to us, so we can be patient, even if we're super hungry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I'll sign this contract now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I'll sign this contract now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I'll sign this contract now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because we'll see you... for a long time. Fu fuu fuu.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because we'll see you... for a long time. Fu fuu fuu.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because we'll see you... for a long time. Fu fuu fuu.
